package_info:
Name: text-utils
Version: 1.2.0
Summary: Pure Python text processing utilities
Home-page: https://github.com/example/text-utils
License: MIT
Requires-Python: >=3.9
Requires-Dist: none
analysis: Simple pure-Python package with no native dependencies. No C extensions, no Cython, no CFFI. Build system: setuptools with pyproject.toml. Source build should succeed without any additional system packages. No accelerator dependencies detected.
jira_context: Onboard text-utils 1.2.0 to the builder. Pure Python package, no special requirements.
